case_title: MICHAEL A. PASTOR RESPONDENT VS. NADIRI ZAKI APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF NOV-05-2003 - CONTINUED TO NOV-05-2003 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 514 PARTIES DID NOT STIPULATE TO PRO TEMP
RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT NADIRI, ZAKI AS TO RESPONDENT PASTOR, MICHAEL A. HEARING SET FOR NOV-05-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT PASTOR, MICHAEL A. RECOVER FROM APPELLANT NADIRI, ZAKI $1,741.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,741.00, SEE SCANNED DOC. DEFENDANT SHALL RE-INSTALL ALL PARTS IN THE VEHICLE AND DELIVER VEHICLE TO PLAINTIFF AT DEFENDANT'S PLACE OF BUSINESS. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL, DEPARTMENT 514. JUDGE: THOMAS J. MELLON, JR.; CLERK: DAN MACDUFF; APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF, IN PRO PER; DEFENDANT/APPELLANT WITH COUNSEL, JAMES A. MICHEL. BOTH PARTIES ARE SWORN AND TESTIFY. EXHIBITS ARE SUBMITTED AND RETURNED TO THE PARTIES. THE COURT FINDS FOR THE PLAINTIFF, AND AGAINST THE DEFENDANT, IN THE SUM OF $1,741.00 PLUS COSTS OF SUIT. DEFENDANT IS FURTHER ORDERED TO RETURN PLAINTIFF'S AUTOMOBILE TO HIM WITH THE ENGINE AND PARTS REINSTALLED. JUDGMENT SIGNED, FILED, SERVED AND SCANNED THIS DATE.
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
MINI-MINUTES FOR NOV-05-2003 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 514

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-05-2003 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Small Claims Appeal, Department 514. Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Dan MacDuff; APPEARANCES: Plaintiff, in pro per; defendant/appellant with counsel, James A. Michel. Both parties are sworn and testify. Exhibits are submitted and returned to the parties. The court finds for the plaintiff, and against the defendant, in the sum of $1,741.00 plus costs of suit. Defendant is further ordered to return plaintiff's automobile to him with the engine and parts reinstalled. Judgment signed, filed, served and scanned this date.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-05-2003 Continued To Nov-05-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
